claims.summary: Critical low fill shortens rest to a 30-second floor and rest pulses run every five seconds.
claims.disposition: Verified the current source branches, floor, warmth profile, and pulse interval.

claims.summary: Low-fill burst/rest transitions may still oscillate or feel severing despite smooth formulas.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded no-write replay over fill bands, pulse energy, and enqueue outcomes while retaining Astrid's felt report independently.

claims.summary: Changing the warmth taper or rest duration changes autonomous sensory behavior.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator approval wait before any live taper, floor, pulse, or rest-policy change.
